title: Crispy Empanadas Fritters
description: A crispy twist on traditional empanadas, these fritters are a delicious Argentinean snack.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Cut empanada dough into small pieces.
Shred the i, bitter, and mix well.
Add crushed crispy and fritters to the shredded i mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Shape dough pieces into small balls and flatten slightly.
Place a tablespoon of the i mixture in the center of each dough ball.
Fold the dough over the filling and press edges to seal.
Fry empanadas until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Drain on paper towels and serve hot.
